title: Pan-Seared Red Snapper with German-Style Breadcrumbs
description: A delicious and easy-to-make German-inspired dish featuring pan-seared red snapper topped with crispy breadcrumbs.
instructions: 1. Season the snapper fillets with salt and pepper.
2. Dust the fillets with flour, shaking off excess.
3. Heat a skillet over medium-high heat with 2 tablespoons of melted butter.
4. Sear the snapper fillets for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
5. Meanwhile, mix the breadcrumbs with 2 tablespoons of melted butter.
6. Transfer the snapper to a plate and top with breadcrumb mixture.
7. Serve immediately, garnished with lemon wedges if desired.
